title: How Do You Pack 14 EBAY Orders in 20 Minutes? (Multi-Item Orders + Quick Resize Tricks)

description:
Our eBay Store: https://ebay.us/RGj1W6
All of my links: https://linktr.ee/garage_flips

Lonnie and Candice race to pack 14 EBAY items across 11 orders in under 20 minutes — Candice has a 20-minute deadline before she has to leave, and the clock is on. The lineup: a 4-item LSU memorabilia lot (2019 LSU Tigers National Championship SnapBack hat with the matching Joe Burrow football poster, plus the 2023 LSU NCAA Baseball National Championship hat with the corresponding Paul Skenes baseball poster — a buyer-built bundle pairing football and baseball championships), a single Destro Weapons Supplier ROC Rise of G.I. Joe Cobra action figure, a Kurt "Airtight" Schnurr Hostile Environment Specialist G.I. Joe figure, two RCA Digital to Analog Converter Boxes (one new-open-box + one used), an Urban Decay 24/7 MILDEW Olive Green Shimmer Glide On eye pencil, a LEGO Bionicle Toa Hordika lot of 18 minifigures, a pair of Classique Sling Back pointed toe flats in ivory and gold (size 7.5), a sealed bottle of Sorelle Watermelon Tanning Drops, a signed-and-autographed 1989 Roger's Cajun Cookbook by Vernon Roger, and a Dr. Groot Hair Thickening tube as the closing pack.

Quick-pack technique demonstrations throughout: 864 vs 1086 box selection, on-the-fly resizes for awkward figure heights, the cross-cut flap-fold trick to shorten a tall box, an inside resize without the dedicated resizer tool, and the running discussion about USPS Ground Advantage rate increases (with a side argument about whether Ground Advantage has been getting more competitive than UPS Ground for medium-weight boxes). Bonus content: Lonnie debating the optimal sandwich-cut geometry (corners vs. diagonals — Candice prefers quarters with toothpicks).

Final time: 18 minutes 44 seconds. Bet won.

If you watch reseller and packing-channel content for the day-in-the-life rhythm — orders coming in, packs going out, banter while we work — this is exactly that. Order receipts visible on screen for each pack so you can see what we sold for.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
0:00 The 20-minute deadline (Candice has somewhere to be)
0:08 LSU Joe Burrow + Paul Skenes 4-item memorabilia lot ($62.96)
2:16 Sorelle Watermelon Tanning Drops
3:30 LEGO Bionicle Toa Hordika 18-minifigure lot
4:21 Destro G.I. Joe Cobra figure (ROC Rise of Cobra)
6:48 Urban Decay 24/7 MILDEW eye pencil
7:34 RCA Digital to Analog Converter Box (new)
9:29 Classique sling-back flats Sz 7.5
10:47 Kurt "Airtight" Schnurr G.I. Joe Hostile Environment Specialist
13:07 RCA Digital to Analog Converter Box (used)
15:03 Roger's Cajun Cookbook (signed by Vernon Roger, 1989)
16:41 Dr. Groot Hair Thickening — last item
18:44 Bet won — under 20 minutes

Thanks for hanging out with us in the shed packing today's orders. If you like watching real reselling life as it happens, subscribe and we'll see y'all in the next one.

#ImGonnaPackIt #PackWithUs #EbayPacking #LSU #GIJoe
